<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\CuckooFilter; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/cf.count/ * * Returns the number of times an item may be in the filter. * Because this is a probabilistic data structure, this may not necessarily be accurate. */ class CFCOUNT extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'CF.COUNT'; } }
